query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `drive_runs` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `uid` varchar(36) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `org_id` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `project_uid` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `campaign_uid` varchar(36) DEFAULT NULL,
  `route_uid` varchar(36) DEFAULT NULL,
  `device_uid` varchar(36) DEFAULT NULL,
  `probe_uid` varchar(36) DEFAULT NULL,
  `status` enum('DRAFT','RUNNING','UPLOADING','COMPLETED','FAILED','CANCELED') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DRAFT',
  `started_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `ended_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_by` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `meta_json` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX `idx_dr_org_proj_created` (`org_id`, `project_uid`, `created_at` DESC, `uid` DESC),
  INDEX `idx_dr_org_status_created` (`org_id`, `status`, `created_at` DESC)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `drive_location_samples` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `uid` varchar(36) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `org_id` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `run_uid` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `ts` timestamp NOT NULL,
  `lat` double NOT NULL,
  `lon` double NOT NULL,
  `speed_mps` double DEFAULT NULL,
  `heading_deg` double DEFAULT NULL,
  `accuracy_m` double DEFAULT NULL,
  `altitude_m` double DEFAULT NULL,
  `source` enum('GPS','MANUAL') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'GPS',
  INDEX `idx_dls_org_run_ts` (`org_id`, `run_uid`, `ts`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `drive_run_events` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `uid` varchar(36) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `org_id` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `run_uid` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `ts` timestamp NOT NULL,
  `type` enum('NOTE','PHOTO','MARKER','ERROR','CUSTOM') NOT NULL,
  `severity` enum('INFO','WARN','ERROR') DEFAULT 'INFO',
  `message` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `data_json` json DEFAULT NULL,
  INDEX `idx_dre_org_run_ts` (`org_id`, `run_uid`, `ts`)
);
